action.reasoning: We have PESQ 3.134 from pretrained MetricGAN+. To potentially improve further, fine-tune the mask generator on our training data with SI-SDR loss. This may adapt the model to the exact split and push PESQ higher. Since no training time spent yet, small risk. We'll fine-tune 5 epochs (quick), validate, and submit eval with the fine-tuned model.
